## Meeting Purpose

[Discuss ongoing projects, workflow improvements, and team coordination strategies.](https://fathom.video/share/s_NEH_VPX9yTZuDQzStsoQN4x7JUnrdM?tab=summary&timestamp=1.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Regular one-on-one meetings will be implemented to improve project oversight and team communication](https://fathom.video/share/s_NEH_VPX9yTZuDQzStsoQN4x7JUnrdM?tab=summary&timestamp=34.0)
  - [Workflow optimization and automation efforts are ongoing, with a focus on improving the RAMP vendor comparison process](https://fathom.video/share/s_NEH_VPX9yTZuDQzStsoQN4x7JUnrdM?tab=summary&timestamp=154.0)
  - [Plans to develop new features like page inventory and knowledge base to enhance content creation and management](https://fathom.video/share/s_NEH_VPX9yTZuDQzStsoQN4x7JUnrdM?tab=summary&timestamp=263.0)
  - [Discussions on potential changes to catalog structure and deployment processes to streamline operations](https://fathom.video/share/s_NEH_VPX9yTZuDQzStsoQN4x7JUnrdM?tab=summary&timestamp=367.0)

## Topics

### One-on-One Meeting Structure

  - [Implementing weekly one-on-one meetings to review projects and tasks](https://fathom.video/share/s_NEH_VPX9yTZuDQzStsoQN4x7JUnrdM?tab=summary&timestamp=34.0)
  - [Considering bi-weekly team meetings (1-1.5 hours) for broader information exchange](https://fathom.video/share/s_NEH_VPX9yTZuDQzStsoQN4x7JUnrdM?tab=summary&timestamp=291.0)
  - [Aim to improve context sharing and reduce workload imbalances](https://fathom.video/share/s_NEH_VPX9yTZuDQzStsoQN4x7JUnrdM?tab=summary&timestamp=335.0)

### Workflow Optimization

  - [Marcus working on RAMP vendor comparison automation](https://fathom.video/share/s_NEH_VPX9yTZuDQzStsoQN4x7JUnrdM?tab=summary&timestamp=154.0)
  - [Challenges in creating complex data structures and parsing for specific fields](https://fathom.video/share/s_NEH_VPX9yTZuDQzStsoQN4x7JUnrdM?tab=summary&timestamp=154.0)
  - [Exploring use of Cloud AI for generating YAML and artifacts](https://fathom.video/share/s_NEH_VPX9yTZuDQzStsoQN4x7JUnrdM?tab=summary&timestamp=154.0)
  - [Discussing potential improvements in workflow creation and deployment processes](https://fathom.video/share/s_NEH_VPX9yTZuDQzStsoQN4x7JUnrdM?tab=summary&timestamp=240.0)

### Team Workload and Support

  - [Observed imbalance in client support workload](https://fathom.video/share/s_NEH_VPX9yTZuDQzStsoQN4x7JUnrdM?tab=summary&timestamp=499.0)
  - [Considering implementing support rotation to allow team members to focus on development tasks](https://fathom.video/share/s_NEH_VPX9yTZuDQzStsoQN4x7JUnrdM?tab=summary&timestamp=720.0)
  - [Exploring ways to involve non-technical team members in ticket filing and basic support](https://fathom.video/share/s_NEH_VPX9yTZuDQzStsoQN4x7JUnrdM?tab=summary&timestamp=720.0)

### New Feature Development

  - [Page Inventory: Automating website scraping, page monitoring, and opportunity discovery](https://fathom.video/share/s_NEH_VPX9yTZuDQzStsoQN4x7JUnrdM?tab=summary&timestamp=263.0)
  - [Knowledge Base: Creating a storage system for research, call recordings, and other content artifacts](https://fathom.video/share/s_NEH_VPX9yTZuDQzStsoQN4x7JUnrdM?tab=summary&timestamp=252.0)
  - [Discussing potential integration between Atlas and Flow for artifact sharing and consumption](https://fathom.video/share/s_NEH_VPX9yTZuDQzStsoQN4x7JUnrdM?tab=summary&timestamp=291.0)

### Catalog and Deployment Improvements

  - [Considering changes to catalog structure, possibly moving away from large XML files](https://fathom.video/share/s_NEH_VPX9yTZuDQzStsoQN4x7JUnrdM?tab=summary&timestamp=263.0)
  - [Exploring programmatic SEO approaches and markdown-to-JSON conversions](https://fathom.video/share/s_NEH_VPX9yTZuDQzStsoQN4x7JUnrdM?tab=summary&timestamp=360.0)
  - [Discussing potential UI-based workflow creation with backend deployment options](https://fathom.video/share/s_NEH_VPX9yTZuDQzStsoQN4x7JUnrdM?tab=summary&timestamp=1997.0)
